subject: applying selection filters
body:
Hi,

I am plotting histograms after frame alignment and CTF fitting:

WarpTools filter_quality --settings warp_frameseries.settings --histograms

Then I am removing some tilts with this command:

WarpTools filter_quality --settings warp_frameseries.settings --defocus 2.4 
--resolution 1 10 --motion 0 13  --output warp_frameseries_filtered.txt

However, the removed tilts are not updated in the settings file.  I would 
expect them to be removed when I run the histogram plotting again.  How do 
I exclude the bad tilts before the next step?

Cheers,
Juha
